name: Ziti Baked My Way
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ziti or Mostaccioli - cooked and drained
2 jars Spaghetti Sauce (32 oz each) - OR 2 quarts Homemade Italian Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ziti or mostaccioli pasta until al dente. Drain.
2. Spread a thin layer of sauce over the bottom of a large roasting dish.
3. Sprinkle with 1/3 of the Parmesan cheese.
4. Soften the ricotta cheese in microwave on LOW (30%) for about 1-1/2 to 2 minutes.
5. Layer with half each of ziti, ricotta cheese, sauce, and half of the remaining Parmesan cheese.
6. Repeat layers.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for approximately 1 hour.
8. Let stand for 30 minutes before serving.
Note: If making ahead, cover dish with plastic wrap. Do not cover with foil as the tomato mixture will react negatively. Remove plastic wrap and cover with foil before baking.
